top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(CAST(results.fastestLapTime AS REAL)) 
FROM results 
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
WHERE races.year = 2006 
  AND races.name = 'United States Grand Prix' 
  AND results.position <= 10;

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results 
WHERE raceId = (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
) 
AND driverId IN (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE raceId = (
        SELECT raceId 
        FROM races 
        WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
    ) 
    AND position <= 10
);

SELECT AVG(CAST(results.fastestLapTime AS REAL)) 
FROM results 
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
WHERE races.year = 2006 
  AND races.name = 'United States Grand Prix' 
  AND results.position <= 10;

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId AND r.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE ra.year = 2006 
  AND ra.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
  AND ds.position <= 10;

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results 
WHERE raceId = (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
) 
AND driverId IN (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE raceId = (
        SELECT raceId 
        FROM races 
        WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
    ) 
    AND position <= 10
);

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results r
WHERE r.raceId = (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
) 
AND r.driverId IN (
    SELECT ds.driverId 
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races rac ON ds.raceId = rac.raceId
    WHERE rac.year = 2006 AND rac.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
    AND ds.position <= 10
);

SELECT AVG(CAST(results.fastestLapTime AS REAL)) 
FROM results 
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId 
WHERE races.year = 2006 
  AND races.name = 'United States Grand Prix' 
  AND results.position <= 10;

SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId AND r.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE ra.year = 2006 
  AND ra.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
  AND ds.position <= 10;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(fastestLapTime) 
FROM results r
WHERE r.raceId = (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE year = 2006 AND name = 'United States Grand Prix'
) 
AND r.driverId IN (
    SELECT ds.driverId 
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races rac ON ds.raceId = rac.raceId
    WHERE rac.year = 2006 AND rac.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
    AND ds.position <= 10
);
